{% extends "base.html" %} {% block body %} {% set page_class = "docs list" %} {% endblock body %} {% block header %} {% set current_section = "" %} {{ macros_header::header(current_section=current_section) }} {% endblock header %} {% block content %}
{{ macros_sidebar::docs_sidebar(current_section=current_section, current_url=current_url) }}
{{ macros_breadcrumbs::docs_breadcrumbs(section=section) }}
{{ section.content | safe }} {# Card list for child sections #} {% set index_path = current_path ~ "_index.md" | trim_start_matches(pat="/") %} {% set index = get_section(path=index_path) %} {% if index.subsections %}
{% for s in index.subsections %} {% set subsection = get_section(path=s) %}
{{ subsection.title }} →
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{{ macros_navigation::docs_navigation(section=section) }}
{{ macros_toc::docs_toc(page=section, edit_path=section.relative_path) }}
{% endblock content %}
